basic_details.job_title: WCD Odisha Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Women and Child Development Department Odisha
basic_details.short_information: Women and Child Development Department Odisha (WCD Odisha) Anganwadi Helper Notification 2026 has been released on the official website engagement-awc.odisha.gov.in. A total of 02 vacancies for Anganwadi Helper have been announced through the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Recruitment 2026.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the WCD Odisha Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 27-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of WCD Odisha to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: WCD Odisha Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the WCD Odisha Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download WCD Odisha Anganwadi Helper - Balangir Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the WCD Odisha Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 27-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of WCD Odisha to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Helper posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Helper recruitment is 27th July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed the 10th grade or an equivalent examination from a recognized board to be eligible for the Anganwadi Helper positions.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for WCD Odisha recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category of candidates (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Helper recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to apply through the official website.

faq.question: Q5. When did the online application process start?
faq.answer: The online application process for the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Helper recruitment commenced on 1st September 2023.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these government jobs?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Anganwadi Helper posts involves Document Verification and the preparation of a Merit List based on the verified documents.

faq.question: Q7. What is the official website for WCD Odisha recruitment?
faq.answer: The official website for WCD Odisha recruitment, where you can find more details and apply online, is http://engagement-awc.odisha.gov.in.

faq.question: Q8. Are there any age relaxations provided?
faq.answer: Information regarding age relaxation for specific categories is not detailed here. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any applicable age relaxations.
